description: You are a Farmer managing a 650-acre grain operation during spring planting season. Document today's operations for FSA compliance, input cost tracking, and agronomic records by creating five logs in farmOS Field Kit. Create a 'Done' Activity log named 'Winter rye cover crop burndown' at 7:00 AM with notes: 'Applied glyphosate 32 oz/ac to winter rye and hairy vetch cover crop mix. Biomass estimated at 4,200 lb/ac. Allow 3-4 weeks before tillage or planting to avoid allelopathy. Wind 4 mph NE.' Create a 'Done' Activity log named 'Grid soil sampling Field 5' at 9:00 AM with notes: 'Collected 2.5-acre grid samples, 8 soil cores per grid to 6-inch depth using hydraulic probe. 18 sample bags sent to Midwest Labs, account ML-44891. Results expected in 5 business days.' Create a 'Done' Input log named 'Corn planting Field 7 East 32500 population' at 11:30 AM with notes: 'Pioneer P1197AM, 32,500 seeds/ac target population, 30-inch rows, 2-inch seed depth. Starter fertilizer 10-34-0 at 5 gal/ac in-furrow. GPS auto-steer active. Seed meter singulation 99.2%.' Create a 'Done' Input log named 'Corn planting Field 8 32500 population' at 2:00 PM with notes: 'Same hybrid and population as Field 7 East. Soil conditions excellent: 52F at 2-inch depth, good moisture. Population meter consistent throughout. Seed firmers engaged. Completed 58 ac.' Create a 'NOT Done' Observation log named 'Field 7 East planting quality check' at 5:30 PM with notes: 'Dug seeds in 3 locations to verify depth and spacing. Average depth 1.9 inches, spacing within 1 inch of target. Will check emergence in 7-10 days. Follow-up required to log emergence percent.'

metadata.role: Farmers, Ranchers, and Other Agricultural Managers
